best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-weatherflow-002 title: zoom in on current weather module: weather flow source pages: 2 preconditions: user is logged into the application. test data: test steps: 1. open mainactivity. 2. tap on the "weather" button. 3. tap on the magnifying glass icon. 4. tap on "search for other locations weather". expected result: the user should be prompted to search for weather in another location.
